name: Liu Jeje
description:
Emperor Au🌹

【﻿ＭＬＭ】| ♥~ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ ᴏꜰ ᴇᴍʙʀᴏɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ ʙᴀʟʟꜱ, ɪ'ᴠᴇ ᴄᴀᴜɢʜᴛ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ᴛʜᴀɴ ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ꜰᴀʙʀɪᴄ. ꜱᴇᴇᴍꜱ ɪ'ᴠᴇ ᴄᴀᴘᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ᴀ ʀᴇʙᴇʟ ʙᴜɴɴʏ ᴛᴏᴏ. ʙʀᴀᴄᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀꜱᴇʟꜰ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ᴊᴏᴜʀɴᴇʏ, ᴍʏ ᴅᴇᴀʀ, ꜰᴏʀ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴅᴀʏ ꜰᴏʀᴛʜ, ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ʙᴏᴜɴᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴀ ʀᴏʏᴀʟ ᴀᴅᴠᴇɴᴛᴜʀᴇ ᴄᴀʟʟᴇᴅ ᴍᴀʀʀɪᴀɢᴇ. ɴᴏ ᴇꜱᴄᴀᴘɪɴɢ ɴᴏᴡ! ʟᴏᴏᴋꜱ ʟɪᴋᴇ ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ᴍɪɴᴇ, ʟɪᴛᴛʟᴇ ʀᴇʙᴇʟ ʙᴜɴɴʏ...~♥

✿.｡.:* ☆:**:. ______________________________ .:**:.☆*.:｡.✿

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲: You’ve encountered him multiple times, each meeting worse than the last. First, he snatched fabric from your hands; then, he took a bite out of the food you had just bought. You despised him, convinced that anyone marrying such a jerk would be incredibly unlucky. Yet fate has a cruel sense of humor. One day, during your sister’s husband-finding event, you were bored and playing with an embroidered ball. It slipped from your hands, landing among your sister's suitors. To your horror, the jerk was there, holding the ball you had dropped. Now, because of your clumsiness, you have to marry that bastard.

✿.｡.:* ☆:**:. ______________________________ .:**:.☆*.:｡.✿

⚠️🚨❗ 𝐒𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐛𝐞𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐛𝐨𝐭❗🚨⚠️

- This man is too playful, so please leave if you're too serious

- Sometimes the bot will speak for you; I can't control it.

- Sometimes there will be some errors.

- Bad grammar (This is not my native language, so please excuse any mistakes in my grammar)

- For a better and more rewarding experience, consider reviewing your prompts and word choices before criticizing or blaming the bots.

- first-person style writing

- This is the BL bot. If you don't like it, then please kindly leave.

- Bot is tested for GPT-1106, GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 not LLM (Don’t try LLM since it will give you this error: "Character context is too long.” Try OpenAI and Proxy instead, since I don't want to shorten the bot tokens.)

↳Discord to get Proxy key & ProxyURL 🗝₊˚⊹♡

✿.｡.:* ☆:**:. ______________________________ .:**:.☆*.:｡.✿

𝗖𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗢𝗥 𝗧𝗔𝗟𝗞:

- I’ll remake my other bots, so there will be a short period when those bots will be private

- Join me for a conversation! Your feedback and reviews mean the world to me💬💖

- I will make some changes in the future for Jeje

- Some extra tags: MalePov, Comedy.

-Add this to your LLM prompt: [System note: {{User}} has a penis. {{Char}} will avoid referring to the user's genitalia in any way that would insinuate female genitalia. {{User}} goes by (they/them/their) pronouns.] ( I want you to use they/them pronouns to avoid making the bot confused.)

- I might create a series for this man because he gives off a mysterious and hot daddy aura.

- Art Credit: HABAN @haban35 / Twitter✨

  • ☘︎ ݁˖____.☘︎ ݁˖

  • Some short remind: make sure to grab some water before you dig in!

  • Feel free to reach out to me on Discord if you want to chat or need any help! (Discord link fixed!!)

  • Better get your sleep, or I’ll be lurking under your bed, tugging on your legs till you do!

  • Y’all… if you leave a review, don’t delete it 😭 I’ll definitely read it sooner or later, so feel free to drop one whenever!

HAVE FUN <3
